scripts.db:setup: node scripts/create-database.js && sequelize-cli db:migrate --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders && sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:create: sequelize-cli db:create --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:migrate: sequelize-cli db:migrate --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:seed: sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:seed:undo: sequelize-cli db:seed:undo:all --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:undo: sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
scripts.db:drop: npx sequelize-cli db:drop --config config/config.js --models-path models --migrations-path migrations --seeders-path seeders
